notes: Focused JSON subset derived from ODK Central's official OpenAPI 3.0.1 spec (a ~13.7k-line YAML in getodk/central-backend). Field shapes (Project, Form, Submission, OData feed, Dataset) follow the authoritative spec. Not saved verbatim: subsetted to the endpoints the adaptor calls (getForms, getSubmissions OData feed, generic get/post/request) since the full document is far larger than needed. createForm's real body is XForms/XLSForm, modeled here as an XML string placeholder.
